title: Feedback - Mopinion form is opened
scenario: Mopinion feedback form in App Settings displays empty fields and options (Bug, Suggestion, Compliment, Other) with Your Feedback, Name, Last name, email fields, and Send button
steps: Go to App Settings (Home → Account → App Settings)
Observe the Mopinion feedback form that loads
expected: The Mopinion feedback form displays correctly as a web page with: empty text fields (Your Feedback, Name, Last name, Email), selectable options (Bug, Suggestion, Compliment, Other), and a Send button.
